description: A customer 'Buttrey Food & Drug' has placed an order for wind energy equipment and needs a formal sales invoice. Log into ERPNext (Administrator / admin) and create a new Sales Invoice for 'Buttrey Food & Drug' with the following items: 15 units of 'Wind Turbine' (Small Wind Turbine for Home Use) at $21.00 each and 8 units of 'Wind Mill A Series' (Wind Mill A Series for Home Use 9ft) at $28.00 each. Set the posting date to today, add a 'Due Date' 30 days from today, and include a remark: 'Q1 renewable energy equipment — residential installation batch'. Submit the invoice once complete. The task is finished when the Sales Invoice is in 'Submitted' state.
